reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: The output contains an explicit note that '28 sections omitted for token budget'. This has resulted in the loss of approximately 50% of the document content. Entirely missing pages include 4 through 12, 22, 24, 28, 31, 33, 35, 36, 37, 42, 47, 49, 50, 52, and 53. Significant sections omitted include 'NCDIT's Role', 'Language Access Efforts', the entire 'Definitions' section, 'Factor 1' and 'Factor 2' standards/practices (partially), and 'Section 4: Notification of Language Assistance Services'.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Source contains 55 pages of content including specific sections like 'Definitions' (pp. 9-11), 'Authority' (p. 7), and 'Section 4' (pp. 41-42).
concerns.output_quote: The JSON explicitly states: '_omitted': '28 sections omitted for token budget'. It jumps from element 21 (page 3) to element 127 (page 13), skipping pages 4-12 entirely. Similar jumps occur throughout.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: Several sections present in the output are missing substantial content. On page 3, the numbered list 'Overview of Standard' ends after item 2, missing items 3 and 4 which appear on page 4 of the source. On page 44, the 'Implementation Goals' list is missing the first 11 bullet points.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 3: 'This Language Access Plan outlines... 3. Implementation Goals... 4. 5-Year Action Plan...'. Page 44: 'Implementation Goals... Review of federal... Review of digital equity... Overview of the value... [total 11 bullets]'.
concerns.output_quote: Element index 19 stops after item 2. Element index 460 begins with bullets from page 45 ('Ensure that all new staff...'), omitting the entire list from page 44.

concerns.analysis: The heading hierarchy is inconsistent. Major section headers like 'SECTION 1' (element 13) are H2. However, sub-headers within the 'Four-Factor Analysis' (2.1) such as 'Implementation Goals' (element 129) and 'Five-Year Action Plan' (element 134) are also assigned H2. Furthermore, 'Overview of Standard' (element 141) is H2. This creates a flat hierarchy where subsections are at the same level as main sections, breaking screen reader navigation logic.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: 2.1 FOUR-FACTOR ANALYSIS (Heading); Implementation Goals (Sub-heading); Five-Year Action Plan (Sub-heading)
concerns.output_quote: "text": "SECTION 1: INTRODUCTION AND BACKGROUND", "level": 2; "text": "Implementation Goals", "level": 2; "text": "Five-Year Action Plan", "level": 2

concerns.analysis: Tables that span across pages in the source PDF are corrupted in the output. For example, the Factor 1 Action Items table starts on page 13 and ends on page 14. In the output, this is rendered as two separate tables: element 137 contains only the header row, and element 140 contains the data rows but lacks the header row. This occurs for multiple action plan tables throughout the document, making the data tables structurally incomplete.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Five-Year Action Plan table starting on page 13 ('Phase', 'Action Items' headers) and continuing onto page 14.
concerns.output_quote: Table at element 137 contains headers only. Table at element 140 contains data rows ('II', 'Language Access Coordinator will request...') but lacks the header row.

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: There is a significant text truncation in the section regarding interpretation waivers. The name of the guidance document referenced is cut off mid-sentence, leaving the text incomplete and the information missing.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: ...must sign an interpretation waiver form following the guidelines set in the Proposed Language Access Policy and Interpretation Waiver Form Guidance document.
concerns.output_quote: Element 297: '...must sign an interpretation waiver form following the guidelines set in the Proposed Language Access Policy and ' element 299: ' document.'

concerns.analysis: The output fails to preserve URLs as functional links. URLs present in footnotes (elements 20, 21) are rendered as plain text. Superscript numbers used for footnotes in the text (e.g., element 16) are text-only and not linked to the footnote elements. This violates the requirement to preserve contact and government URLs as functional links.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Footnote 1 text on page 3 containing reference to American Community Survey data.
concerns.output_quote: "¹Please see Appendix 1: Factor 1 American Community Survey Demographic Data..."

action_items: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.
